clothes.name: Classic White Tee
clothes.image: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 200' width='200' height='200'><path d='M 40,40 L 70,20 C 85,35 115,35 130,20 L 160,40 L 180,80 L 150,90 L 145,75 L 145,170 L 55,170 L 55,75 L 50,90 L 20,80 Z' fill='%23FFFFFF' stroke='%23CDB4DB' stroke-width='3' stroke-linejoin='round'/><path d='M 70,20 C 85,35 115,35 130,20' fill='none' stroke='%23CDB4DB' stroke-width='3'/></svg>
clothes.notes: Super soft organic cotton tee. Perfect for layering.

clothes.name: Lavender Slit Kurti
clothes.image: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 250' width='200' height='250'><path d='M 50,30 L 75,15 C 85,25 115,25 125,15 L 150,30 L 170,80 L 145,90 L 140,75 L 140,220 L 115,220 L 115,160 L 85,160 L 85,220 L 60,220 L 60,75 L 55,90 L 30,80 Z' fill='%23CDB4DB' stroke='%23FFFFFF' stroke-width='3' stroke-linejoin='round'/><path d='M 90,20 L 100,45 L 110,20' fill='none' stroke='%23FFFFFF' stroke-width='2'/></svg>
clothes.notes: Beautiful lavender shade with a modern cut.

clothes.name: Blush Pink Crop Top
clothes.image: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 150' width='200' height='150'><path d='M 45,30 L 70,15 C 85,28 115,28 130,15 L 155,30 L 170,70 L 145,80 L 140,65 L 140,110 L 60,110 L 60,65 L 55,80 L 30,70 Z' fill='%23FFC8DD' stroke='%23FFFFFF' stroke-width='3' stroke-linejoin='round'/></svg>
clothes.notes: Ribbed crop top, goes well with high waisted skirts.

clothes.name: Cozy Charcoal Hoodie
clothes.image: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 200' width='200' height='200'><path d='M 40,45 L 70,30 C 85,38 115,38 130,30 L 160,45 L 180,95 L 155,105 L 148,85 L 148,170 L 52,170 L 52,85 L 45,105 L 20,95 Z' fill='%232D3748' stroke='%23FFC8DD' stroke-width='3' stroke-linejoin='round'/><path d='M 70,30 C 70,5 130,5 130,30' fill='none' stroke='%23FFC8DD' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M 70,130 L 130,130 L 120,160 L 80,160 Z' fill='none' stroke='%23FFC8DD' stroke-width='2'/></svg>
clothes.notes: Perfect oversized fit for studying in the hostel library.

clothes.name: Classic Beige Trousers
clothes.image: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 250' width='200' height='250'><path d='M 60,20 L 140,20 L 145,80 L 135,230 L 105,230 L 100,100 L 95,230 L 65,230 L 55,80 Z' fill='%23F5E6D3' stroke='%232D3748' stroke-width='2' stroke-linejoin='round'/><path d='M 60,40 L 140,40' fill='none' stroke='%232D3748' stroke-width='1.5'/></svg>
clothes.notes: Pleated trousers. Great for presentations and meetings.

clothes.name: Aesthetic Cream Skirt
clothes.image: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 200' width='200' height='200'><path d='M 70,20 L 130,20 L 160,150 L 40,150 Z' fill='%23FFF8E7' stroke='%23CDB4DB' stroke-width='3' stroke-linejoin='round'/><path d='M 70,20 C 90,25 110,25 130,20' fill='none' stroke='%23CDB4DB' stroke-width='3'/></svg>

clothes.name: Floral Pink Dress
clothes.image: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 250' width='200' height='250'><path d='M 65,30 L 75,15 C 85,25 115,25 125,15 L 135,30 L 145,70 L 125,85 L 160,220 L 40,220 L 75,85 L 55,70 Z' fill='%23FFC8DD' stroke='%23FFFFFF' stroke-width='3' stroke-linejoin='round'/><circle cx='80' cy='120' r='5' fill='%23FFF8E7'/><circle cx='120' cy='140' r='5' fill='%23FFF8E7'/><circle cx='100' cy='170' r='5' fill='%23FFF8E7'/><circle cx='70' cy='180' r='5' fill='%23FFF8E7'/><circle cx='130' cy='190' r='5' fill='%23FFF8E7'/></svg>
clothes.notes: Bright and cheerful floral midi dress.

clothes.name: Retro White Sneakers
clothes.image: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 150 100' width='150' height='100'><path d='M 20,70 L 35,30 C 50,25 75,35 110,45 L 130,50 L 135,75 L 20,75 Z' fill='%23FFFFFF' stroke='%23CDB4DB' stroke-width='3' stroke-linejoin='round'/><path d='M 20,70 L 135,70' fill='none' stroke='%23CDB4DB' stroke-width='2'/><path d='M 60,35 L 75,55' fill='none' stroke='%23CDB4DB' stroke-width='2'/><path d='M 70,38 L 85,58' fill='none' stroke='%23CDB4DB' stroke-width='2'/></svg>
clothes.notes: Chunky white sneakers. Matches literally everything.

clothes.name: Beige Totebag
